backend.changelog: Output panel: pick a download folder + optional ZIP, delivered into one Name_Revision subfolder per selected assembly. PDF/DXF/Excel are checked by default and remembered across BOMs. The ERP Integration tab is hidden by default (re-enable in Settings - Funkcije). Clearer on-screen reason when CAD Bridge generation is unavailable.

cadBridge.changelog: Resolve virtual components by their stable child name so STEP and 3D PDF are produced for them (fixes the in-session vs BOM parent-name mismatch that left them missing on a fresh cache).
